# The Letter That Moved Oprah to Tears

Season 3 Episode 328  
Aired on 09/09/2012 | CC

Oprah says Iyanla's new show, _Iyanla: Fix My Life_ , is at the very heart of her vision for OWN. While filming the show, Iyanla sent her an email that brought Oprah to tears. Watch as Oprah reads part of that letter and shares why it touched her so deeply.
